name: PyMC-Marketing (Bayesian Marketing Mix Modeling)

performance.notes: MCMC sampling is slow (minutes to hours); NUTS sampler; GPU via JAX backend

agent_readiness.notes: Bayesian Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) and Customer Lifetime Value (CLV). from pymc_marketing.mmm import MMM, GeometricAdstock, LogisticSaturation. mmm = MMM(adstock=GeometricAdstock(l_max=8), saturation=LogisticSaturation(), date_column='date', channel_columns=['tv', 'digital'], control_columns=['price']). mmm.fit(data). mmm.plot_waterfall_components_decomposition(). Budget allocation: mmm.optimize_budget(budget=10000). CLV: from pymc_marketing.clv import BetaGeoModel. bg = BetaGeoModel(data=clv_df). bg.fit(). bg.expected_purchases(future_t=52). PyMC backend with NUTS sampler. Bayesian uncertainty quantification.

gotchas: MCMC sampling is slow — large datasets require hours with NUTS sampler
Requires understanding of Bayesian modeling to interpret results
MMM results are sensitive to prior specification
CLV models require purchase history in specific format
best_when: Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) with uncertainty quantification
Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) modeling with BG/NBD or Pareto/NBD
Budget allocation optimization with Bayesian credible intervals
When uncertainty in channel attribution is business-critical
avoid_when: Quick attribution analysis (use simple regression instead)
summary: PyMC-Marketing provides Bayesian Marketing Mix Modeling and Customer Lifetime Value. MMM(adstock=GeometricAdstock(), saturation=LogisticSaturation()).fit(data). Budget optimization with credible intervals. CLV: BetaGeoModel(data).fit(); expected_purchases(future_t=52). NUTS MCMC sampler (slow but principled). Apache-2.0 by PyMC Labs. Best when uncertainty quantification in channel attribution and CLV is business-critical.
